# Sync Massage Therapy

> Award-winning Registered Massage Therapist in Colwood, BC. Triple-certified clinic (RMT, CAT(C), Holistic Nutritionist) founded by Daryl Stubbs, specializing in chronic pain, sports injuries, and advanced recovery modalities. Serving the West Shore since 2015 with 8x Community Votes awards and 120+ five-star reviews.

## Business Details
- Location: 132, 328 Wale Rd #120, Colwood, BC V9B 1J2 (Coastal Offices, 1 min from Juan De Fuca Rec Centre)
- Service Areas: Colwood, Langford, West Shore, Royal Bay, Victoria, Esquimalt, View Royal
- Contact: (250) 812-8698 | info@synctherapy.ca
- Insurance: Instant direct billing for Pacific Blue Cross, Canada Life, Sun Life, Manulife, and other major providers

## Core Clinical Services
- Massage Therapy https://www.synctherapy.ca/services/massage-therapy/ — Deep tissue and myofascial release for chronic pain
- Athletic Therapy https://www.synctherapy.ca/services/athletic-therapy/ — Specialized injury assessment and rehabilitation by a CAT(C)
- Visceral Manipulation https://www.synctherapy.ca/services/visceral-manipulation/ — Gentle manual therapy to restore organ mobility and resolve referred pain
- Deep Tissue Massage https://www.synctherapy.ca/services/deep-tissue-massage/ — Targeted pressure to release chronic tension
- Myofascial Release https://www.synctherapy.ca/services/myofascial-release/ — Fascial release techniques for structural alignment
- Nutrition Consulting https://www.synctherapy.ca/services/nutrition-consulting/ — Holistic nutrition guidance for gut health and inflammation
- Direct Billing https://www.synctherapy.ca/direct-billing/ — Information on accepted insurance providers
- Book Online https://synctherapy.janeapp.com/
